SalesRoles.co Full Documentation

Mission:
To provide global remote and on-site sales job listings with mandatory transparent compensation (base, OTE, commission) in a modern, visually striking interface.

Page Descriptions:
- /: Hero section with search, stats, featured jobs, and social proof.
- /jobs: Filterable list of all roles (Remote/Hybrid/On-site, Sector, Seniority, Salary).
- /jobs/[slug]: Detailed job view with full comp breakdown and structured data.
- /post-job: Multi-step form for companies to post jobs with preview and payment.
- /pricing: Standard ($99), Featured ($249), and Unlimited ($999/yr) plans.
- /dashboard: Manage listings for companies and profiles for candidates.
- /admin: Moderation, approval, and system stats for site owners.
- /blog: Sales career advice, salary guides, and industry news.
- /salary-insights: Benchmarking data derived from live listings.

Salary Benchmarking Structure:
We track Base Salary, On-Target Earnings (OTE), Commission Structure, and Quotas across:
- Roles: SDR, AE, Account Manager, Sales Director, VP Sales.
- Regions: USA, UK, Australia, EU, Remote.
- Sectors: SaaS, FinTech, HealthTech, hardware, Services.

Blog Categories:
- Sales Career Advice
- Salary Guides
- Interview Tips
- Industry News
